entries.title: Exposition on Psalm 69
entries.excerpt: We have been born into this world, and added to the people of God, at that period wherein already the herb from a grain of mustard seed has spread out its branches; wherein already the leaven, which at first was contemptible, has leavened three measures, that is, the whole round world repeopled by the three sons of Noe: Genesis 9:19 for from East and West and North and South shall come they that shall sit down with the Patriarchs, Matthew 8:11 while those shall have been driven without, that have been born of their flesh and have not imitated their faith. Unto his glory then of Christ's…
